title: Custom-keyword extension point (x-jit-*)
description:
A registration point for `x-jit-*` custom JSON Schema keywords, plus the graceful-degradation test the unknown-keyword claim depends on.

## Background

Future declarative cross-field logic will be added as custom keywords rather than a second formalism. v1 ships only the extension point and proves schemas using such keywords degrade gracefully under a standard validator. See decision record sections 5.3 and 11 and `dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine-plan.md` ("Risks").

## Success Criteria

- [ ] [hard] The engine exposes a registration point that registers `x-jit-*` custom keywords with the validator (`jsonschema::ValidationOptions::with_keyword`).
- [ ] [hard] A test demonstrates a schema using an `x-jit-*` keyword still validates structurally under a standard (no-custom-keyword) validator, confirming unknown keywords are ignored rather than rejected.
- [ ] [aspirational] A sample keyword (optionally CEL-backed) is demonstrated end-to-end.

## Notes

Low priority and off the critical path. This task discharges the decision record 5.3 degradation obligation.
